refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust error correction and packet retransmission protocols.
DP2: Use adaptive bitrate and compression algorithms to optimize data flow.
DP3: Employ network quality monitoring and dynamic adjustment mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement robust error correction and packet retransmission protocols.

potential_sources: Interaction between error correction and network monitoring modules.
Dependency on network link quality affecting retransmission efficiency.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates communication quality control, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions impacting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating adaptive bitrate (DP2) if retransmission overhead causes unacceptable latency.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for teleoperation communication management and control.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface for sending and receiving teleoperation data packets over the network.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report communication quality metrics to the NGHE Solution module.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system but not focused on communication specifics; high diffusion if assigned here.
Vehicle module is physical hardware focused; poor containment for communication logic.
Best containment for communication protocols and packet loss management.
Safety Services focus on alerts and safety policies, not communication quality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for telemetry reporting.
Dependency on Network Link interface reliability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution to avoid diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (error correction and retransmission) directly addresses the refined FR of maintaining packet loss within limits.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if telemetry reporting is not clearly separated between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment for DP1 with minimal diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and network link monitoring is feasible within assigned IM.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality management to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface contracts for Telemetry data between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
Monitor latency impact due to retransmission protocols.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. All gates pass with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system modules.

revise.why: Current level is sufficiently detailed and consistent; next step is to decompose sub-FRs.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Customer-defined packet loss limits are achievable with selected DP.
open_risks: Latency impact from retransmission protocols on teleoperation responsiveness.
Interface diffusion between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.
evidence_needed: Empirical packet loss and latency measurements under representative network conditions.
Interface performance and reliability tests between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
